blended.narrative: Calabogie Peaks is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.5 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 7,394 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 6" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
